name: Spinach Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Less than full package of frozen chopped spinach (thaw and squeeze).
2. 1 cup mozzarella cheese, cubed into about 2 thick slices.
3. 1/2 cup Romano or Parmesan cheese, grated.
4. Grease a small loaf pan without flouring it.
5. Mix all ingredients together by hand, do not use a mixer; the mixture will be lumpy.
6. Pour the mixture into the loaf pan.
7. Bake for about 30-45 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Serve hot or cold and slice to desired thickness.
Note: I beat the eggs by hand before adding them to the other ingredients.
